signatures: getFolderInfo(teamUuid: string, folderUuid: string): Promise<IDMT_FolderItem | undefined>
remarks: 当 [parentFolderUuid](../interfaces/IDMT_FolderItem.md) 等于 [teamUuid](../interfaces/IDMT_FolderItem.md) 时，代表当前文件夹为指定团队下的一级文件夹
returnSummary:
Promise<[IDMT\_FolderItem](../interfaces/IDMT_FolderItem.md) \| undefined>

文件夹属性，如若为 `undefined` 则获取失败
